ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible. ICC/West Sweden Chamber of Commerce stamp present.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible. Issued by Central National Sweden AB.

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number is SEG-25D-357117, and the remarks field contains '9349/CNS/Made in USA'. Neither constitutes an LC reference. Standard verification applies.

locations_found: Invoice page 1 - header/company name: 'Central National Sweden AB'
Invoice page 1 - address block: 'Södra Larmgatan 6, Gothenburg, 41 116, Sweden'
Invoice page 1 - footer: 'CENTRAL NATIONAL SWEDEN AB'

pairing_validation.reasoning: The certificate does not contain an explicit invoice number reference. However, consignor 'Central National Sweden AB' is clearly identifiable as the invoice issuer in the invoice header and footer. Consignee 'POLYTANKS GHANA LIMITED' is identifiable in both SOLD TO and CONSIGNED TO fields of the invoice. Pairing validation passed on criteria 2 and 3.

certificate_fields.raw_text: 15th , Dadeban Road, North Industrial Area, Post Box 5334, Accra, Ghana
certificate_fields.normalized_text: 15th, dadeban road, north industrial area, post box 5334, accra, ghana

invoice_fields.raw_text: 15th , Dadeban Road , North Industrial Area, Post Box.- 5334, Accra, Ghana
invoice_fields.normalized_text: 15th, dadeban road, north industrial area, post box 5334, accra, ghana

invoice_fields.raw_text: 15th , Dadeban Road , North Industrial Area, Post Box.- 5334, Accra, Ghana
invoice_fields.normalized_text: 15th, dadeban road, north industrial area, post box 5334, accra, ghana

invoice_fields.raw_text:
Kraftliner ref. Enduraliner
RW 1800-1600mm, DIA 1270mm, Core 100mm, CERTIFIED
51.848 MT AT USD 705.00/MT, Amount: USD 36,552.85
invoice_fields.normalized_text: kraftliner ref. enduraliner rw 1800-1600mm, dia 1270mm, core 100mm, certified 51.848 mt at usd 705.00/mt

checkpoints.certificate_value: Central National Sweden AB, Södra Larmgatan 6, 411 16, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Central National Sweden AB, Södra Larmgatan 6, Gothenburg, 41 116, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.details: Consignor name 'Central National Sweden AB' found exactly in invoice header as the invoice issuer. Direct match — no need to proceed to 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.6.
Certificate: 'Central National Sweden AB'. Invoice issuer: 'Central National Sweden AB'. Exact match after normalization.
Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'Sweden' (explicit in address). Also confirmed by VAT prefix 'SE' in SE559187836701. Country verified.

rules_applied.description: Group structure - consignor name found in invoice header as issuer

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Central National Sweden AB' at 'Södra Larmgatan 6, 411 16, GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. Invoice issuer is 'Central National Sweden AB' at 'Södra Larmgatan 6, Gothenburg, 41 116, Sweden'. Company name is an exact match. Address differences are minor formatting: 'GÖTEBORG' vs 'Gothenburg' (same city, Swedish vs English name), '411 16' vs '41 116' (postal code format variation). Country 'Sweden' matches exactly. VAT prefix 'SE' confirms Sweden. Rule 4.1.0 gives direct MATCH as consignor name is the invoice issuer.
checkpoints.motivation: Consignor 'Central National Sweden AB' in the certificate is exactly the same as the invoice issuer 'Central National Sweden AB'. Country 'Sweden' matches in both documents. Direct MATCH via rule 4.1.0.

checkpoints.certificate_value: POLYTANKS GHANA LIMITED, 15th , Dadeban Road, North Industrial Area, Post Box 5334, Accra, Ghana
checkpoints.invoice_value: POLYTANKS GHANA LIMITED, 15th , Dadeban Road , North Industrial Area, Post Box.- 5334, Accra, Ghana

comparison_steps.description: Check SOLD TO field in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice SOLD TO: 'POLYTANKS GHANA LIMITED'. Certificate consignee: 'POLYTANKS GHANA LIMITED'. Exact name match.
Invoice CONSIGNED TO also states 'POLYTANKS GHANA LIMITED'. Double confirmation.
Certificate: 'Ghana'. Invoice SOLD TO: 'Ghana'. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 - billing field (SOLD TO) used for consignee verification

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'POLYTANKS GHANA LIMITED' at 'Post Box 5334, Accra, Ghana'. Invoice SOLD TO is 'POLYTANKS GHANA LIMITED' at 'Post Box.- 5334, Accra, Ghana'. Company name is an exact match. Address differences are minor formatting: 'Post Box 5334' vs 'Post Box.- 5334'. Country 'Ghana' matches exactly. CONSIGNED TO field also confirms same party. Rule 4.2.0.2 priority 1 (billing field) applied.
checkpoints.motivation: Consignee 'POLYTANKS GHANA LIMITED' in the certificate matches exactly the SOLD TO party in the invoice. Country 'Ghana' matches in both documents. MATCH via primary billing field rule 4.2.0.2.

checkpoints.invoice_value:
Kraftliner ref. Enduraliner
RW 1800-1600mm, DIA 1270mm, Core 100mm, CERTIFIED
Total Unit Count: 31 Rolls

comparison_steps.description: Check for article numbers in certificate
comparison_steps.details: No article numbers are stated in the certificate. Proceeding to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify identity-bearing main designation in certificate and search in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Certificate identity-bearing main designation: 'Kraftliner'. Invoice description begins with 'Kraftliner ref. Enduraliner'. The word 'Kraftliner' is found exactly in the invoice description. 'ref. Enduraliner' and the specification details (RW 1800-1600mm, DIA 1270mm, Core 100mm) are additional non-identity-bearing additions per 4.3.4. The unit count '31 rolls' in the certificate matches 'Total Unit Count: 31 Rolls' in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Assess additional text in invoice description
comparison_steps.details: 'ref. Enduraliner', 'RW 1800-1600mm, DIA 1270mm, Core 100mm, CERTIFIED' are specification details. They do not change the product identity. The main designation 'Kraftliner' is clearly identifiable in both documents.

rules_applied.description: Priority 2 - Controlled text matching. Identity-bearing main designation 'Kraftliner' identified in both documents.
Non-identity-bearing additions - specification details in invoice do not alter product identity.

evidence.raw_text:
Kraftliner ref. Enduraliner
RW 1800-1600mm, DIA 1270mm, Core 100mm, CERTIFIED

checkpoints.debug_explanation: The certificate describes goods as '31 rolls Kraftliner'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'Kraftliner'. In the invoice, the description starts with 'Kraftliner ref. Enduraliner' followed by technical specifications. The word 'Kraftliner' is an exact textual match. The additional text 'ref. Enduraliner' and 'RW 1800-1600mm, DIA 1270mm, Core 100mm, CERTIFIED' are non-identity-bearing additions per rule 4.3.4 — they specify the product variant but do not change the product identity. The quantity '31 rolls' in the certificate matches 'Total Unit Count: 31 Rolls' in the invoice. No semantic interpretation or synonymy was used.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because invoice says 'Enduraliner' and certificate says 'Kraftliner'
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The invoice says 'Kraftliner ref. Enduraliner' — Kraftliner is the product category and Enduraliner is a reference/brand name. The identity-bearing designation 'Kraftliner' is present in both. Per rule 4.3.4, 'ref. Enduraliner' is a non-identity-bearing addition.

checkpoints.motivation: The identity-bearing main designation 'Kraftliner' from the certificate is found exactly in the invoice description. Additional specifications in the invoice (ref. Enduraliner, dimensions) are non-identity-bearing additions per rule 4.3.4. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains 'GW/NW 51.848 MT'. This is the verification-basis quantity.
comparison_steps.details: Box 7 states 'GW/NW 51.848 MT'. Numeric value: 51.848, Unit: MT, Weight category: GW/NW (both gross and net indicated as same value).
Invoice states 'Total Weight Quantity: 51.848 MT'. Numeric value 51.848 and unit MT match exactly. Also confirmed in description line: '51.848 MT AT USD 705.00/MT'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states GW/NW (both). Invoice states 'Total Weight Quantity' without specifying GW or NW.
comparison_steps.details: Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2: certificate states one numeric value for both GW and NW (GW/NW 51.848 MT = same value for gross and net). Invoice provides one total weight value (51.848 MT) without category. Since the numeric value matches exactly and the invoice does not contain a contradictory alternative weight value, this is MATCH per 4.4.2.2 point 2.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 6 states '31 rolls'. Invoice states 'Total Unit Count: 31 Rolls'.
comparison_steps.details: Additional confirmation: unit count also matches. 31 rolls = 31 Rolls.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 value (GW/NW 51.848 MT) is the verification-basis quantity.
Occurrence check - numeric value 51.848 MT found in invoice as 'Total Weight Quantity: 51.848 MT'.
Weight category - certificate states GW/NW as same value; invoice states total weight without contradicting category. Point 2 applies.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states 'GW/NW 51.848 MT'. This is the verification-basis quantity per rule 4.4.2.1. The invoice states 'Total Weight Quantity: 51.848 MT' — exact numeric and unit match (51.848 MT = 51.848 MT). The certificate uses GW/NW notation meaning gross and net weight are the same value. The invoice does not specify GW or NW separately but provides one total value that matches. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2, since the certificate effectively states a single numeric value (51.848 MT for both GW and NW) and the invoice confirms this exact value without a contradictory alternative, the result is MATCH. Additionally, '31 rolls' in box 6 matches 'Total Unit Count: 31 Rolls' in the invoice, providing further confirmation.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MANUAL_REVIEW because certificate says GW/NW and invoice doesn't specify category
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The certificate assigns the SAME value (51.848 MT) to both GW and NW. The invoice confirms 51.848 MT as total weight. There is no ambiguity since both categories have the same value. Per 4.4.2.2 point 2, when one weight value is stated and invoice doesn't contain a contradictory alternative, MATCH.

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate states GW/NW 51.848 MT in box 7. Invoice states 'Total Weight Quantity: 51.848 MT'. Exact numeric and unit match. Certificate gives same value for both GW and NW, so no ambiguity exists. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit country of origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice contains explicit field 'Country of Origin: USA'. Also confirmed in SHIPPING MARKS: '9349/CNS/Made in USA'.
Certificate: 'USA'. Invoice: 'USA'. Exact match, no normalization needed.

rules_applied.description: Explicit 'Country of Origin: USA' field found in invoice.
Positive verification - USA in certificate matches USA in invoice exactly.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'USA' as country of origin. Invoice has an explicit 'Country of Origin: USA' field. The values are identical — no normalization required. Additionally, the shipping marks in both documents contain 'Made in USA', further confirming the origin. Rule 4.5.5 positive verification is satisfied.
checkpoints.motivation: Certificate states 'USA' as country of origin. Invoice explicitly states 'Country of Origin: USA'. Exact match. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate. Standard verification applies.
Document A identified as certificate (EU Certificate of Origin, ICC). Document B identified as commercial invoice issued by Central National Sweden AB. Correct pairing established.

PASSED. Criterion 2 (consignor identifiable in invoice): Central National Sweden AB found as invoice issuer. Criterion 3 (consignee identifiable): POLYTANKS GHANA LIMITED found in SOLD TO and CONSIGNED TO.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Group structure - consignor search in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH. 'Central National Sweden AB' found as invoice issuer in header and footer.
MATCH. Sweden = Sweden. Also confirmed by SE VAT prefix.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Consignee priority order - billing field check
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH. SOLD TO field contains 'POLYTANKS GHANA LIMITED' matching certificate consignee.
MATCH. Identity-bearing main designation 'Kraftliner' found in both documents.
Invoice additions 'ref. Enduraliner', specifications are non-identity-bearing. Do not affect match.
MATCH. 51.848 MT found in invoice as 'Total Weight Quantity: 51.848 MT'.
MATCH. Certificate GW/NW 51.848 MT (same value for both). Invoice 51.848 MT total weight. No contradictory alternative. Point 2 applies.
FOUND. Explicit 'Country of Origin: USA' in invoice.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Central National Sweden AB, mottagaren Polytanks Ghana Limited, varubeskrivningen Kraftliner, kvantiteten 51.848 MT och ursprungslandet USA kan alla verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) verified as MATCH. Certificate of Origin SEG-25D-357117 issued 2025-09-18 by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce for Kraftliner (31 rolls, GW/NW 51.848 MT) of USA origin, shipped from Central National Sweden AB to Polytanks Ghana Limited, is fully consistent with Commercial Invoice 18660 dated 2025-07-24.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: Central National Sweden AB, Södra Larmgatan 6, 411 16, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Central National Sweden AB, Södra Larmgatan 6, Gothenburg, 41 116, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Direct identification of consignor as invoice issuer (group structure rule)
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Central National Sweden AB' i certifikatet är exakt samma som fakturans utställare. Landet Sverige bekräftas i båda dokumenten. Adressskillnader är enbart formatmässiga (Göteborg vs Gothenburg, postnummerformat).

sections.certificate_value: POLYTANKS GHANA LIMITED, 15th, Dadeban Road, North Industrial Area, Post Box 5334, Accra, Ghana
sections.invoice_value: POLYTANKS GHANA LIMITED, 15th, Dadeban Road, North Industrial Area, Post Box.- 5334, Accra, Ghana (SOLD TO)
sections.rule_applied: Billing field priority (SOLD TO) used for consignee verification
sections.motivation: Mottagaren 'POLYTANKS GHANA LIMITED' i certifikatet matchar exakt SOLD TO-fältet i fakturan. Landet Ghana matchar i båda dokumenten. Även bekräftat i CONSIGNED TO-fältet.

sections.invoice_value: Kraftliner ref. Enduraliner, RW 1800-1600mm, DIA 1270mm, Core 100mm, CERTIFIED; Total Unit Count: 31 Rolls
sections.rule_applied: Controlled text matching — identity-bearing main designation 'Kraftliner' found in both documents. Additional specifications are non-identity-bearing.
sections.motivation: Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'Kraftliner' i certifikatet återfinns exakt i fakturans varubeskrivning. Tillägg i fakturan (ref. Enduraliner, dimensioner) är specifikationsdetaljer som inte ändrar produktidentiteten. Antal '31 rolls' matchar 'Total Unit Count: 31 Rolls'.

sections.rule_applied: Occurrence check — numeric value 51.848 MT found exactly in invoice total weight field
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger GW/NW 51.848 MT i ruta 7. Fakturan anger 'Total Weight Quantity: 51.848 MT'. Exakt numerisk och enhetsmatchning. Certifikatet anger samma värde för brutto- och nettovikt, så ingen tvetydighet föreligger.

sections.rule_applied: Positive verification — explicit Country of Origin field in invoice matches certificate
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'USA' som ursprungsland i ruta 3. Fakturan anger uttryckligen 'Country of Origin: USA'. Exakt matchning utan normalisering.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints MATCH with confidence >= 0.97. Overall confidence 0.98. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW. comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent with all checkpoints being MATCH. workflow_recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result.
